message:
fix: rename toon_rust dependency to tru to match upstream crate rename

The toon_rust repository renamed its crate from `toon_rust` to `tru`.
Updated Cargo.toml dependency and all `use toon_rust::` imports in src/lib.rs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
